allow: PowerShell(docker exec sweetbook_test-api-1 alembic upgrade head 2>&1)
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); paths=[p for p in d['paths'] if 'admin' in p]; print\('\\n'.join\(paths\)\)")
Bash(wsl -e sh -c 'docker exec sweetbook_test-api-1 python -c "from app.api.routes import admin; print\(\\"admin OK\\"\); print\([r.path for r in admin.router.routes]\)"')
Bash(wsl -e sh -c 'until docker logs sweetbook_test-web-1 2>&1 | grep -q "Ready in"; do sleep 3; done && docker logs sweetbook_test-web-1 --tail 15')

Bash(wsl -e sh -c 'curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/api/orders/1/confirm -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\\"quantity\\":1,\\"recipient_name\\":\\"테스트\\",\\"recipient_phone\\":\\"010-1234-5678\\",\\"shipping_address\\":\\"서울시 강남구\\"}" | python3 -m json.tool 2>&1 | head -20')

Bash(wsl -e sh -c 'until docker logs sweetbook_test-web-1 2>&1 | grep -q "Ready in"; do sleep 3; done && echo "build complete" && docker logs sweetbook_test-web-1 2>&1 | grep -E "orders|error|Error" | head -10')
Bash(wsl -e sh -c 'until docker logs sweetbook_test-web-1 2>&1 | grep -q "Ready in"; do sleep 3; done && docker logs sweetbook_test-web-1 2>&1 | grep -E "orders|Error|error" | head -5')
Bash(wsl -e sh -c 'docker logs sweetbook_test-web-1 2>&1 | grep "orders\\[id\\]" | tail -1')
Bash(wsl -e sh -c 'until docker logs sweetbook_test-web-1 2>&1 | grep -q "Ready in"; do sleep 3; done && echo done')
